_comment: Settings for ClaudeCodeTmuxBackend. Pass via: claude --settings /abs/path/to/att-tmux-backend.settings.json. Do NOT add a $schema field (breaks hook registration on v2.1.114+).
_comment_danger_prompt: skipDangerousModePermissionPrompt suppresses the interactive confirmation prompt that Claude Code shows when running in --dangerously-skip-permissions mode. ClaudeCodeTmuxBackend drives an automated pipeline session and cannot respond to interactive prompts; without this flag the session stalls waiting for user input that never arrives.
